## Type of Change

- [ ] `fix:` Bug fix
- [ ] `feat:` New feature
- [ ] `refactor:` Code cleanup (no behavior change)
- [ ] `docs:` Documentation only
- [ ] `test:` Tests only
- [ ] `chore:` Build / tooling / dependencies

## Related Issue

Closes #

## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] CHANGELOG is not manually edited (release-please handles it)
